name: VS Code Extensions
description: Offline bundle of essential VS Code extensions for C++ development, unit testing, and Python.

packages.name: C/C++
packages.description: IntelliSense, debugging and code browsing for C/C++

packages.name: CMake Tools
packages.description: Configure, build, and debug CMake projects

packages.name: CMake Language
packages.description: CMake syntax highlighting and code snippets

packages.name: Python
packages.description: IntelliSense, linting, debugging and formatting for Python

packages.name: Pylance
packages.description: Fast, feature-rich language support for Python

packages.name: C++ TestMate
packages.description: Run Catch2, GoogleTest, and doctest unit tests

packages.name: Remote — SSH
packages.description: Develop on remote machines over SSH
